message:
refactor(scheduler): migrate hot paths to use RuntimeState task() methods (bd-2018r)

Replace direct `state.tasks.get/get_mut(id.arena_index())` accesses with
`state.task(id)` and `state.task_mut(id)` method calls in scheduler hot paths.

This is Phase 2a of the TaskTable extraction - migrating to use the existing
RuntimeState accessor methods prepares for eventually extracting TaskTable
into its own lock.

Files changed:
- src/runtime/scheduler/worker.rs: 5 accesses migrated
- src/runtime/scheduler/three_lane.rs: 11 accesses migrated

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
